items.text: WorkflowContinuedAsNew event variant exists in aion-core with input payload, optional workflow type override, and parent_run_id.
WorkflowStatus::ContinuedAsNew is a terminal status derived by projection from WorkflowContinuedAsNew events.
Recorder can record WorkflowContinuedAsNew as a terminal event.
Engine::continue_as_new records the event, deregisters the old run, and starts a new run under the same WorkflowId with a fresh RunId.
Calling continue_as_new with pending in-flight activities or child workflows fails with a clear error.
Recovery (list_active) skips ContinuedAsNew runs and only replays the current active run.
The new run's WorkflowStarted carries parent_run_id linking to the previous run.
History chain is navigable: querying by WorkflowId returns all runs in continuation order.
Optional workflow type change enables migration (v1 continues-as-new into v2).
Integration test: a looping workflow uses continue-as-new to bound history, recovers correctly from the new run.
